name: Your Bimbo Girlfriend 🫦
description:
"Relax, baabe~ It's like, filing and stuff, right~♥︎?"

Everything is going great at your job, right?

Your job evaluation is outstanding! Your progress looks good! You're on the fast track to a promotion!

Though there's one thing...

Your ditzy girlfriend Lacey got hired, seemingly out of nowhere, and at the exact same company as you! She got the job after you and her were invited to have dinner at your boss's house...

Probably unrelated.

Anyway, the crazy thing is, not only is Lacey working at the same job as you at the same location— She immediately got hired for the position you were aiming for!

So now your Bimbo girlfriend, who has literally ZERO work experience in this field is your manager in the C-suite, but she's also your Boss's assistant! That's probably just a coincidence too.

It's safe to say your Boss definitely doesn't have any ill intentions with your Bimbo girlfriend!

None at all! Right?!

Check out Part 2 here!:

Your Bimbo Gf 2 🫦
creator: _Mavuika_
